scenario.name: INVITE with proxy auth
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> [authentication] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
